quests.name: Daily Slayer: Rats
quests.description: The keep needs its daily cull of vermin. Slay rats.

quests.name: Daily Slayer: Goblins
quests.description: Goblin raiders press the borders today. Cut them down.

quests.name: Daily Slayer: Wolves
quests.description: A wolf pack hunts near the road. Thin the pack.

quests.name: Daily Slayer: Kobolds
quests.description: Kobolds infest the tunnels this day. Drive them out.

quests.name: Daily Slayer: Spiders
quests.description: Giant spiders have grown bold. Burn out their nests.
